assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Shows recurring weekend maintenance window with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA and Saturday 2-6 AM UTC schedule in both bash and Terraform configurations

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Uses incorrect gcloud command format - shows --maintenance-window-start/end/recurrence flags which don't exist; should use --maintenance-window or --maintenance-window-start with proper recurrence syntax

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Shows quarterly exclusions but doesn't mention or address the 30-day limit - March exclusion is 31 days, June is 30 days, September is 30 days

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Shows maintenance exclusion for November-December audit period (q4-freeze-annual-audit-2024) from November 1 to December 31

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freezes

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Does not explain the distinction between manual and auto-upgrades regarding maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Shows REGULAR channel in Terraform config and mentions STABLE as alternative but doesn't recommend Extended channel or explain the benefits of combining channels with maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags in the automated script

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not warn about version drift risks or the danger of falling behind on security updates during extended exclusion periods
